title: Canada open with a statement win in Vancouver
summary: The co-hosts thrilled a packed BC Place, with the crowd and fan festival turning downtown Vancouver into a sea of red.

title: Switzerland find their rhythm in Los Angeles
summary: A four-goal display at SoFi Stadium gives the Swiss early momentum as the Western region heats up.

title: Atlanta kicks off as Czechia and South Africa share the points
summary: Mercedes-Benz Stadium hosted a tense opener, with MARTA carrying thousands of fans from downtown to the gates.

title: Mexico City roars as Estadio Azteca makes World Cup history
summary: Estadio Azteca becomes the first stadium to host matches across three different World Cups, with a record crowd for the opener.

title: Record ticket demand across all 16 host cities
summary: FIFA confirms the 2026 edition has drawn the highest ticket demand in tournament history as the expanded 48-team format gets under way.

title: Dallas readies AT&T Stadium for a marquee run of fixtures
summary: Arlington gears up for one of the busiest match schedules of the tournament, with DART shuttles and fan zones across the metroplex.

title: New York / New Jersey to host the 2026 Final at MetLife Stadium
summary: The Meadowlands prepares for the showpiece on July 19, with NJ Transit running expanded match-day service from Manhattan.

title: Seattle's Lumen Field turns up the noise for the group stage
summary: Famous for its atmosphere, Lumen Field welcomes fans straight off Link light rail for a packed slate of Western-region matches.
